name: applILTxRequestPending
title: applILTxRequestPending
description: If the IL clamp 15 state (for ASR PDU IL Ignition state) is being enabled by ILActivateClamp15 (for ASR PDU IL ARILSetIgnitionState) or any wake-up-allowed signal is changed, then optionally this functions is called. Within this function the bus should be requested by the network management DLL.
